allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "echo $PATH && which node 2>/dev/null || echo ''node not found'' && ls ~/.nvm/versions/node/ 2>/dev/null || ls ~/.volta/bin/ 2>/dev/null || ls /usr/local/bin/node 2>/dev/null || echo ''no node manager found''")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "ls /usr/local/bin/node 2>/dev/null; ls /usr/bin/node 2>/dev/null; ls ~/.nvm 2>/dev/null; ls /root/.nvm 2>/dev/null; command -v node")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "source ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null; command -v node && command -v pnpm")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "ls /home/rusthp/.nvm/versions/node/ 2>/dev/null && echo found_nvm || ls /home/rusthp/.local/share/fnm/ 2>/dev/null && echo found_fnm || echo ''no manager''")
